TimeEntry.Title: TALY Monthly Site/Network/ Security scan - March 2026
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the monthly task, verified network detective scan reports for the Taly client and downloaded and verified the reports but the O365 reports were having the issues so troubleshooted and setup it again and started the sync and waiting for the reports once generated the reports for TALY and verified them and uploaded in their team channel.

TimeEntry.Title: TALY-HQ-WINEDGE,WIN-3V0EKA0U8E8 : Cisco umbrella old version found, need to update
TimeEntry.Notes: I found an outdated version of Cisco Umbrella on the machine, accessed it, and successfully updated it to the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (win-5.1.16.194).
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.150 on TALY-HQ-WINEDGE, WIN-3V0EKA0U8E8
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on is old version 0.14.146. Connected to the machines TALY-HQ-WINEDGE, WIN-3V0EKA0U8E8 from manage engine, download and installed the latest Version 0.14.150. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: CrowdStrike Sensor Updated with Version 7.34.20610.0: TALY-HQ-WINEDGE
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the CrowdStrike portal, we verified that the CrowdStrike Sensor Version on the following machines. Connected to the machines TALY-HQ-WINEDGE from manage engine, download and installed the latest Sensor Version 7.34.20610.0. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.
